title: anthephora truncata
intro: Anthephora truncata, also known as Truncatella, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family. It is native to Africa and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Anthephora truncata is often used to make infusions and decoctions to alleviate respiratory problems, and is also used in the treatment of fever and rheumatism.
